string.description: UTF-8 text value enclosed in double quotes, supports interpolation with ${...}

number.description: Numeric value, can be integer or floating-point

bool.description: Boolean value, either true or false

list.description: Ordered sequence of values of the same type, created with square brackets

map.description: Collection of key-value pairs where keys are strings and values share a type

object.description: Structural type with named attributes each having their own type

set.description: Unordered collection of unique values of the same type

tuple.description: Ordered collection of values where each element can have a different type

any.description: Placeholder that accepts any type, used in variable type constraints

null.description: Represents the absence of a value, used to explicitly unset an attribute
